question_text: A light bulb transfers 600 joules of energy in 10 seconds. Calculate the power of the light bulb.
explanation: Power is calculated using the formula: Power = Energy ÷ Time. Here, 600 J ÷ 10 s = 60 W. This means the bulb transfers 60 joules of energy every second.
source_name: KS3 Physics Curriculum - Energy and Power
